Comment: I went to 3 classes in total this semester. Tests were online open note. The group project took a little time but was not challenging. Take this class if you want to get through BTE 210 without any work. It has been my easiest class at UM so far and I've heard that this could be one of the more challenging classes with another professor.
Tags: Group projects

Comment: He is a kind professor and accommodated many of my requests. Classes are interesting and exams are easy.
Tags: Amazing lectures, Inspirational, Caring

Comment: The best part was that he recorded all lectures, giving us access to the videos, so we didn't need to attend in person. Exams were online, open book, and easy. The group project was fun and taught practical skills for starting a buisness. Choose good team members, as you need to work hard on it together.
Tags: Group projects, Amazing lectures, Accessible outside class

Comment: This class was great! The professor talked about a lot of up-to-date topics which was nice for a tech class. The midterms were online, open note, and simple content. The group project was slightly more involved than I think it needed to be, and was a little more confusing than other parts of the class. However, he was great overall!

Comment: The class was kinda boring content-wise, but the professor actually made it way better than I expected. You can tell he cares and tries to keep us engaged. Not my favorite topic, but not a bad class overall.

Comment: Dr. Yaraghi's extensive health policy expertise makes this course a standout. His class discussions keep late-night classes engaging. Grades come from debate participation and one policy brief, both rewarding. Strongly recommend!

Comment: Prof. Niam's BTE 210 is great! Clear lectures, approachable. Group project was super fun. Two fair exams, but last one's tougher. Study hard! Worthwile class.

Comment: Professor Yaraghi made this class an absolute pleasure to come to. His lecture and discussions during the class were so interesting and made me question the world further outside of class in the best ways possible. I fully enjoyed his class and the way he conducted them.

Comment: I loved the material in this class and was interested in every discussion we had. The professor was awesome and i really loved how we got to guide the class discussions and how involved the professor was. Overall, a really great course.
